heading: Universally Unique IDs (UUIDs)
body:
The Node.js driver supports UUIDs by using the BSON Binary subclass `UUID`. You
can create a `UUID` object by using the `UUID()` constructor. The following code
example generates a random UUID:

```javascript
import { UUID } from 'mongodb';

const myUuid = new UUID();
```

codeBlocks.content:
import { UUID } from 'mongodb';

const myUuid = new UUID();
